title: Method for preloading application, storage medium, and terminal
abstract: A method and an apparatus for preloading an application, a storage medium, and a terminal are provided. The method includes the following. First, a target interface corresponding to a sliding operation is determined in response to detecting that the sliding operation is on an interface. Then an application with a highest preloading priority is determined from applications in the target interface as a target application. At last, the target application is preloaded.
